newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. The record Q2 (orders +56% to $2.05B, revenue +31% to $1.72B, AI-related revenue already exceeding all of FY25), the FY revenue-growth raise to high-20s%, and analyst PT hikes (JPM $390, Citi $396, Truist $376) all predate the window. The +7.3% move is continued re-rating, not fresh news.

sources.label: Keysight Q2 2026: orders +56%, AI business doubles, raises FY outlook (BigGo)

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent AI supply-chain lens: high-quality test/validation tollbooth, but the page concedes the market already understands the role. Blowout Q2 and guidance raise predate Jun 9; no new info in window. +7.3% move is re-rating, not fresh fundamental news. Hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI-networking/800G-1.6T validation demand; AI revenue already > full FY25 in H1
verdicts.primaryRisk: Tollbooth role well-understood; +72% YTD compresses residual alpha
verdicts.bull: Orders +56%, AI test demand surging, FY guide raised to high-20s% growth; durable design-validation moat.
verdicts.neutral: Best-in-class test franchise but the AI re-rating is recognized; +72% YTD limits asymmetry.
verdicts.bear: Crowded/understood name at +72% YTD; large cap with the bottleneck story already priced.

verdicts.rankRationale: Master under-owned-bottleneck list: yesterday's verdict already pushed KEYS down for the post-Q2 re-rating. No new info since the window opened; the +7.3% move continues the rerating rather than adding fundamental asymmetry. Crowding-adjusted low rank stands; hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI chip-complexity and 1.6T interconnect validation; record Q2 orders
verdicts.primaryRisk: EDA/test/timing bottleneck now broadly recognized; minimal under-ownership left
verdicts.bull: Record orders and AI test demand; raised FY outlook reinforces the tollbooth thesis.
verdicts.neutral: Strong fundamentals but low on the under-owned list because the story is already understood.
verdicts.bear: +72% YTD and large cap leave little residual alpha for an under-owned-bottleneck screen.
